3036600.name: Speed Climb
3036600.description:
Explore the temples and climb the Path.
Collect all the majestic creatures to unlock the secret ending.
If you can reach the top.

Speed Climb is an exhilarating momentum-based climbing game, inspired by Getting Over It and the like. This is our take on the 3D version of this style, with a more dynamic movement system and other exciting features!

Experience...

  • A true test of gamer skill.
  • Fun and satisfying movement system.
  • An open world with secrets to uncover.
  • Game built by speedrunners for speedrunners.
  • "Interesting" difficulty spikes.

Note from the dev:

Hai :D
Thanks for checking out our store page. This is my first game and I sincerely hope you enjoy zipping around the level as much as I did.

Full disclaimer:
This game is hard. Like I-Ninja eyeball level on keyboard hard... I don't expect most people to go past ~30%

Have fun!
3036600.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
